zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Nevil Witt De Raby於1170年之前與Nevil Witt De Raby在英國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs Nevil Witt De Raby于1170年之前与Nevil Witt De Raby在英国结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Witt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German: nickname for someone with white hair or a remarkably pale complexion, from Middle Low German witte ‘white’.
South German: from a short form of the ancient Germanic personal name Wittigo. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine).
English (Hampshire and Wiltshire): variant of   White  .

variants.name: White
meanings: English: from Middle English white, wit (Old English hwīt ‘white’), hence a nickname for someone with white hair or a pale complexion. In some cases it is perhaps from a Middle English survival of the Old English personal name Hwīta, a short form of names in Hwīt- (from hwīt ‘white’). The name may also be topographic, referring to someone who lived by a bend or curve in a river or road (from Old English wiht ‘bend’), the source of the placename of Great Whyte in Ramsey, Huntingdonshire (compare Wight ). This name is also a variant of Wight . The surname White is also very common among African Americans.

Irish and Scottish: adopted for any of several Irish and Scottish Gaelic names based on bán ‘white, fair’ (see Bain 1, McElwain ) or fionn ‘fair’ (see Finn 1). The English surname has been Gaelicized in Ireland as de Faoite.

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘white’, for example German Weiss , French Blanc , Polish Białas (see Bialas ), Slovenian Belec , or any other synonymous Slavic surname beginning with Bel-, Bev-, Biel- or Bil-.

variants.name: Witte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Franz, Kurt, Erwin, Gerhard, Dieter, Egon, Fritz, Gerhart, Lorenz, Eldor, Erhart.
German: variant of   Witt  .
Dutch: nickname for someone with white or blonde hair or an unusually pale complexion, from Middle Dutch witte ‘white’. Compare De Witte .

variants.name: Witts
meanings: English: variant of Witt , with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Americanized form of German   Witz   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Raby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Raby (Cheshire), recorded as Raby from 1096–1101, Raby in Holme East Waver (Cumberland), recorded as Rabic. 1150, or Raby in Staindrop (Durham), recorded as Rabyc. 1050. The placenames probably derive from Old Norse rá ‘boundary, pole’ + bȳ ‘farmstead, village, settlement’, though the Durham placename may derive from Old Norse rá ‘roe, roe buck’ + bȳ, as it does not lie on a known boundary.
English: in some cases, a variant of   Robey  . Additionally, in southwestern England and the Channel Islands there appears to be a further source for the name, maybe a diminutive of   Robert  .

Altered form of French Desrabines (via the intermediate form Daraby): habitational name, with fused preposition and definite article des ‘from the’, denoting someone from Les Rabines, the name of a few places in Brittany. The surname Desrabines is not found in France. Compare Roby 3.

variants.name: Roby
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Roby in Huyton (Lancashire), from Old Norse rá ‘landmark, boundary’ + bȳ ‘farmstead, village’. Compare Raby .
Scottish: variant of   Robbie  .
Variant of   Raby   3, a surname of French origin.

variants.name: Rabey
meanings: English: variant of   Raby  .
Possibly also an Americanized form of Hungarian   Raby   and German   Rabe  .

variants.name: Robey
meanings: English: variant of   Roby  .

nameMeanings.name: Nevil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the enduringly popular Gaelic name   Niall .  From the Middle Ages onwards, this name was found mainly in Ireland, the Highlands of Scotland, and the English-Scottish Border region. However, since the 20th century it has spread to enjoy considerable popularity in all parts of the English-speaking world, although in England it has recently been overtaken by the Gaelic form.

variants.name: Neal
meanings: Variant spelling of   Neil .

variants.name: Neale
meanings: Latin: Dark, swarthy; blacksmith.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Nevil Witt De Raby married Nevil Witt De Raby before 1170, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs Nevil Witt De Raby a épousé Nevil Witt De Raby avant 1170, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs Nevil Witt De Raby hat vor 1170 in England Nevil Witt De Raby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs Nevil Witt De Raby lei sposato Nevil Witt De Raby prima del 1170, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.Raby, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアラビー
ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Nevil Witt De Rabyは1170年以前にイギリスでNevil Witt De Rabyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Nevil Witt De Raby(은)는 1170년 이전 영국에서 Nevil Witt De Raby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs Nevil Witt De Raby casou-se com Nevil Witt De Raby antes 1170, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Nevil Witt De Raby вышла замуж за человека по имени Nevil Witt De Raby перед 1170 г. в местности Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs Nevil Witt De Raby se casó con Nevil Witt De Raby antes de 1170, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
